# Front Range Detail Studio
> Premium in-shop auto detailing, ceramic coating, PPF, paint correction, vinyl wraps, window tint in Centennial/Denver CO. Serving the Front Range with studio appointments. System X Certified Installer. 5.0★ Google (126 reviews).

## Services
- [Ceramic Coating](https://frontrangedetailstudio.com/ceramic-coating): Studio-applied System X MAX G Plus ceramic with lifetime warranty for cars.
- [Paint Protection Film](https://frontrangedetailstudio.com/paint-protection-film-ppf): SunTek Reaction PPF with 12-year warranty, self-healing technology.
- [Window Tinting](https://frontrangedetailstudio.com/window-tint): Ceramic window tint blocking 99% UV and up to 94% infrared heat.
- [Vinyl Wraps](https://frontrangedetailstudio.com/vinyl-wraps): Full color change, partial wraps, commercial fleet wraps. 200+ finishes.
- [Auto Detailing](https://frontrangedetailstudio.com/auto-detailing): Interior/exterior packages from maintenance wash to full restoration.
- [Paint Correction](https://frontrangedetailstudio.com/auto-detailing): Multi-stage machine polishing to remove swirl marks and scratches.
- [RV Detailing](https://frontrangedetailstudio.com/rv-detailing): Wash ($10/ft), oxidation removal ($20-35/ft), ceramic coating ($100/ft).
- [Boat Detailing](https://frontrangedetailstudio.com/boat-detailing): Marine detailing and ceramic coating with up to 5-year warranty.

## Vehicle Specialties
- [Tesla](https://frontrangedetailstudio.com/tesla-detailing): Tesla-specific PPF, ceramic coating, and window tint.
- [BMW](https://frontrangedetailstudio.com/bmw-detailing): BMW paint protection and detailing.
- [Porsche](https://frontrangedetailstudio.com/porsche-detailing): Porsche ceramic coating and PPF.
- [Rivian](https://frontrangedetailstudio.com/rivian-detailing): Rivian R1T/R1S protection packages.
- [Ford Truck](https://frontrangedetailstudio.com/ford-truck-detailing): F-150, Super Duty, Lightning protection.

## About
- Climate-controlled studio at 12559 E Broncos Pkwy, Centennial, CO 80112.
- System X Certified Installer. SunTek/Xpel authorized. 15+ years experience.
- Related: Denver Mobile Detailing (denvermobiledetailing.com) — same operator, mobile-only detailing service.
